title: anisotome geniculata
intro: Anisotome geniculata, also known as Anisotome, is a flowering plant species in the carrot family (Apiaceae) native to New Zealand. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe and heal wounds, reduce swelling, and combat infections. The plant has been used in herbal preparations to promote digestive health and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu, as well as to reduce fever and alleviate headaches. Anisotome geniculata can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, allowing for various methods of consumption to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
